## Root Cause
The error is caused by the inability to install libraries on serverless compute due to missing or inaccessible dependencies in the specified cloud storage.

## Explanation
The Databricks notebook failed because it couldn't install required libraries from the wheelhouse directory. This is likely due to the wheelhouse directory not being properly configured or the required wheel files not being available.

## Fix Description
The fix involves ensuring that the wheelhouse directory contains the required wheel files for the libraries mentioned in the serverless_requirements.txt file and that the path to the wheelhouse directory is correctly specified.

## Corrected Code
